ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability score of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence score of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness score of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness score of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness score of the track */,
  "key" TEXT /* Musical key of the track */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the track contains explicit content */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the track */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album to which the track belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the artist is based */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Preferred loudness of tracks */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Preferred danceability score of tracks */,
  "valence" REAL /* Preferred valence score of tracks */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Preferred instrumentalness score of tracks */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Preferred speechiness score of tracks */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Preferred acousticness score of tracks */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Preferred genre of tracks */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Preferred tempo of tracks */,
  "energy" REAL /* Preferred energy level of tracks */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Preferred mood of tracks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listening event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was listened to */,
  "listen_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the track was listened to on that date */,
  "device" TEXT /* The device used for listening */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the track was listened to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_listening_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the playlist was created */,
  "collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the playlist is collaborative */,
  "privacy" TEXT /* Privacy setting of the playlist (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track in a playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "track_order" INTEGER /* The order in which the track appears in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_tracks_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "score" REAL /* Score indicating how strong the recommendation is */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the recommendation */,
  "context" TEXT /* The context in which the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., like, dislike, skip) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "reason" TEXT /* The reason for the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the audio feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the audio feature */,
  "tempo" REAL /* The tempo of the track in beats per minute (BPM) */,
  "energy" REAL /* The energy level of the track */,
  "mood" TEXT /* The mood of the track (e.g., happy, sad, calm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "subgenre" TEXT /* Subgenre of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription the user has */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the artist */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the performance metric was recorded */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_performance_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the performance metric was recorded */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the performance metric was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_track_performance_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_feature_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the track */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* The algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence" REAL /* The confidence level of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_feature_analysis_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("id")
)
